mapper.select: SELECT WORK_INDCT_NUM FROM tb_jacup WHERE INSERT_DTTM >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_jacup (STATUS_SEQ, WORK_INDCT_NUM, CUST_NUM, EQUT_CD, PROD_CD, MAIN_WORK_INDCT_NUM, INSERT_DTTM, SCAN_START_DTTM, START_DTTM, END_DTTM) VALUES (#{STATUS_SEQ}, #{WORK_INDCT_NUM}, #{CUST_NUM}, #{EQUT_CD}, #{PROD_CD}, #{MAIN_WORK_INDCT_NUM}, #{INSERT_DTTM}, #{SCAN_START_DTTM}, #{START_DTTM}, #{END_DTTM})
